series_metadata.series_description: Reports requested by colleges and universities, the governor’s office, state agencies and other officials or entities.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If OBR perceives that the report has lasting significance to the research/policy making capabilities of OBR, maintain until such significance no longer exists, then destroy. Otherwise, retain 4 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: If OBR perceives that the report has lasting significance to the research/policy making capabilities of OBR, maintain until such significance no longer exists, then destroy Otherwise, retain 4 years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
